stemHtml: What is the effect on Specific Range (SR) and Specific Ground Range (SGR) if you maintain the no-wind VY speed, despite there being a headwind?

options.a: Specific range decreases, specific ground range increases
options.b: Specific range remains constant, specific ground range decreases
options.c: Specific range remains constant, specific ground range increases
options.d: Specific range increases, specific ground range decreases
